title: Maximize Number of Subsequences in a String
titleCn: 字符串中最多数目的子序列

testcases.input: text = "abdcdbc", pattern = "ac" Output: 4 Explanation: If we add pattern[0] = 'a' in between text[1] and text[2], we get "abadcdbc". Now, the number of times "ac" occurs as a subsequence is 4. Some other strings which have 4 subsequences "ac" after adding a character to text are "aabdcdbc" and "abdacdbc". However, strings such as "abdcadbc", "abdccdbc", and "abdcdbcc", although obtainable, have only 3 subsequences "ac" and are thus suboptimal. It can be shown that it is not possible to get more than 4 subsequences "ac" by adding only one character.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: If we add pattern[0] = 'a' in between text[1] and text[2], we get "abadcdbc". Now, the number of times "ac" occurs as a subsequence is 4. Some other strings which have 4 subsequences "ac" after adding a character to text are "aabdcdbc" and "abdacdbc". However, strings such as "abdcadbc", "abdccdbc", and "abdcdbcc", although obtainable, have only 3 subsequences "ac" and are thus suboptimal. It can be shown that it is not possible to get more than 4 subsequences "ac" by adding only one character.

testcases.input: text = "aabb", pattern = "ab" Output: 6 Explanation: Some of the strings which can be obtained from text and have 6 subsequences "ab" are "aaabb", "aaabb", and "aabbb".
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: Some of the strings which can be obtained from text and have 6 subsequences "ab" are "aaabb", "aaabb", and "aabbb".
